description: doc-syncer runs after verifier, finds medium-impact diff, updates technical docs and creates audit record

intent.goal: Add useOrderStatus hook with retry logic

SCENARIO_ROWS.name: useOrderStatus retries on transient failure
SCENARIO_ROWS.given: a transient network error on first call
SCENARIO_ROWS.then: it retries and returns status on success

scenarios: useOrderStatus retries on transient failure | Given transient network error | When useOrderStatus invoked | Then retries and resolves | CI=true npm test -- useOrderStatus -> exit 0 | expected=hook retries 3 times and resolves | actual=hook retried 3 times and resolved

DOC_FILES_SKIPPED.reason: no user-facing surface changed; hook is internal to order processing

learnings: New hook useOrderStatus added with retry logic; hooks-reference.md updated with signature and key behaviors
patterns: Retry pattern introduced for hooks — document in hooks-reference with retry count and backoff strategy
verification: doc-syncer STATUS=COMPLETE; 1 technical doc updated; 1 audit doc created
